entities.name: Donald Trump
entities.description: 45th and 47th President of the United States. Major actor in US foreign policy, NATO tensions, and Mexico-US relations.

entities.name: Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada
entities.description: Co-founder of the Sinaloa Cartel. His arrest in 2024 triggered the Sinaloa fragmentation conflict.

entities.name: Nemesio 'El Mencho' Oseguera Cervantes
entities.description: Founder and leader of CJNG (Jalisco New Generation Cartel). Most-wanted criminal in Mexico.

entities.name: Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG)
entities.description: Mexican criminal organization founded by El Mencho. One of the most powerful cartels operating in Mexico and internationally.

entities.name: Sinaloa Cartel
entities.description: Major Mexican drug trafficking organization, fragmented between El Mayo faction and Los Chapitos after 2024 betrayal.

entities.name: Iran
entities.description: Middle Eastern nation-state. Central actor in the 2026 Iran-US/Israel conflict and broader regional tensions.

entities.name: Israel
entities.description: Middle Eastern nation-state. Key actor in Iran conflict, Gaza war, and October 7 aftermath.

entities.name: Ukraine
entities.description: Eastern European nation-state invaded by Russia in 2022. Central actor in the Ukraine-Russia war.

entities.name: Russia
entities.description: Largest country by area. Invaded Ukraine in 2022; key actor in NATO tensions and global energy markets.

entities.name: NATO
entities.description: Collective defense alliance of 32 member states. Central to Ukraine-Russia war response and US-Europe tensions.

entities.name: Hamas
entities.description: Palestinian militant organization that governs Gaza. Conducted October 7 attacks; central actor in Gaza war.

entities.name: Hezbollah
entities.description: Lebanese Shia militant and political organization backed by Iran. Key actor in Iran conflict and Israel-Palestine dynamics.

entities.name: COVID-19 Pandemic
entities.description: Global pandemic caused by SARS-CoV-2, beginning in 2019. Triggered economic disruption and accelerated geopolitical shifts.

entities.name: October 7, 2023 Hamas Attacks
entities.description: Hamas-led cross-border attack on Israel on October 7, 2023. Triggered the Gaza War and changed regional dynamics.

entities.name: El Culiacanazo
entities.description: October 2019 failed capture attempt of Ovidio Guzmán in Culiacán, Sinaloa. Demonstrated cartel power over the Mexican state.

entities.name: Andrés Manuel López Obrador
entities.description: President of Mexico 2018-2024. Founded Morena party; key actor in Mexico-US relations, cartel policy, and energy reform.

entities.name: Claudia Sheinbaum
entities.description: President of Mexico from October 2024. First female president of Mexico; AMLO's chosen successor from Morena.
